summary: Tested Evolution PRO iteration 67: Admin UI for contract params, App.js splitting, and code refactoring. Fixed 3 bugs during testing: 1) React 'Objects are not valid as React child' error when rendering contract object, 2) 'Invalid time value' in calculateContractEnd function, 3) ContractParamsModal not loading due to API response field mismatch. All backend APIs working, frontend loads correctly after App.js split.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js successfully split from 1907 to ~1450 lines - good refactoring
PartnerDetailModal now properly integrated with ContractParamsModal
Contract object handling needed fixes in multiple places (App.js line 255, PartnerProfileModal)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Fixed contract object rendering, added PartnerDetailModal import and state
/app/frontend/src/components/admin/ContractParamsModal.jsx - Fixed API response field mapping (contract_signed vs is_signed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract params admin endpoints working. PartnerDetailModal accessible via Partner Attivi -> click partner. ContractParamsModal opens via 'Personalizza Contratto' button. Vista Partner tab working with extracted PartnerSections. Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has signed contract so PATCH returns 400.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Rendering p.contract directly when it's an object caused 'Objects are not valid as React child' error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added type check: typeof p.contract === 'object' ? (p.contract?.signed_at ? '✓ Firmato' : 'In attesa') : (p.contract || '—')

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: calculateContractEnd received object instead of date string causing 'Invalid time value'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added handling for contract object: const dateStr = typeof startDate === 'object' ? startDate?.signed_at : startDate

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Frontend expected d.success and d.is_signed but backend returns d.params and d.contract_signed
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed condition from d.success to d.params and d.is_signed to d.contract_signed

features_verified: GET /api/admin/partners/{partner_id}/contract-params - returns default or custom params
PATCH /api/admin/partners/{partner_id}/contract-params - correctly rejects for signed contracts
Admin dashboard loads correctly after App.js splitting
ContractParamsModal opens, shows form fields (corrispettivo, royalty, durata, rate)
Vista Partner works with extracted PartnerSections
